授業目的: This course will provide students with the opportunity to learn about the status of Japanese women in contemporary Japanese history and relevant issues through the lens of two concepts: “unusual times” and “unusual individuals.” “Unusual times” refers to wars during this period, so “Women at War” will be widely discussed in the course. “Unusual individuals” refers to overseas women, including migrants and their descendants. Participants in the course will gain an understanding of women and society in the selected time period in Japanese history and be able to make their own analysis about Japanese women as an academic subject in the developing field of Japanese Studies.
到達目標: (1) Participants will understand general aspects of women in Japanese society from the Meiji Period to the Showa Period.(2) Participants will learn the “push” causes of migration to the outside of Japan and the lives of Japanese women in other countries.　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　(3) Participants will be able to think about people during war and focus on women’s statuses and roles in the past.
授業方法: Students will be expected to finish each reading assignment before coming to class. This class is designed for students who are active learners and are eager to present their thoughts and discuss with other students. Students are not required to give a fully developed speech in English but are strongly encouraged to speak out in English. Please note that one of the assignments will be a short presentation in English.Students are also requested to train their ability to listen to English speech and lectures from the instructor and/or guest speakers. Those who are concerned about their ability are strongly encouraged to listen to English daily.The instructor will also ask for an analysis of the representations of women in movies compared to historical facts, and also regarding the status of women in class materials.

第1回:
【Startup Week】Introduction: Focus and scope (On-demand)
Meiji Japan and Women《90minutes》
Reading: Gorden
第3回: 【Core Weeks②】Migration to the U.S. before the war《90minutes》
第4回: Write comment paper and bring to class
第6回:
【Core Weeks④】Women and War: the Pacific War and Okinawa
《90minutes》
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑤】Passing down the history of Himeyuri Nursing Troops (guest lecture)
《90minutes》
Write comment paper and bring to class
第9回: 【Core Weeks⑦】 Film: War Bride related topic (to be announced) 90 minutes. online/ in-class《90minutes》
Write comment paper and bring to class
第10回: 【Core Weeks⑧】The Cold War and Cultural Representation《90minutes》
第11回: Reading: Nakajima
第14回: 【Flex Hours】Online Lecture: Comments on presentations. 80《80minutes》

教科書/Required texts0: Each reading material is either one chapter of the book or academic article. Readings will be provided in PDF format through kwic.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Short comments are required 5 times: 10 % x 5
成績評価Grading2: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
成績評価Grading3: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
成績評価Grading4: 備考　Note Student presentations are a part of the entire grade. However, the duration of presentations may change depending on the number of participants.
